generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Operational temperature sensor for monitoring environmental conditions in the building"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BuildingSensorDataTransmission
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Operational humidity sensor for monitoring environmental conditions in the building"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BuildingSensorDataTransmission
]

instance CO2Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Operational carbon dioxide sensor for monitoring indoor air quality"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BuildingSensorDataTransmission
]

instance LightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Operational light intensity sensor for visual comfort monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BuildingSensorDataTransmission
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensor for monitoring building usage patterns"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BuildingSensorDataTransmission
]

instance BuildingSensorDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, CO2Sensor, LightSensor, OccupancySensor
]

instance BuildingSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data transmitted via Eclipse Hono and Ditto for building monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BuildingSensorDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto, MDEMethodologies
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT data exchange and device management"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management and protocol adaptation"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance BIMTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM modeling tools for creating and validating building information models"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for real-time 3D visualization and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance MDEMethodologies : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering methodologies for automated model transformations and runtime artifact generation"
    DTDFVocab:enables EnergyComfortOptimizationAnalyticsService, SimulationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building environmental conditions and system performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance EnergyComfortOptimizationAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for optimizing energy consumption, visual comfort, and non-visual health effects"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortInsight, NonVisualHealthEffectsInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Building simulation for performance analysis and scenario testing"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building models and real-time data using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance EnergyConsumptionOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for reducing energy consumption in building operations"
]

instance VisualComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights on lighting conditions and visual comfort for occupants"
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights on health effects from non-visual environmental factors like air quality"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data insights for immediate operational decisions"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results for scenario evaluation and optimization"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of building data for enhanced understanding"
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM model enriched with semantic data for BCS components including geometric, spatial, functional characteristics, and middleware metadata for Hono and Ditto"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMTools, MDEMethodologies
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for HVAC system control in Building Control Systems"
]

instance LightingController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller for lighting system in Building Control Systems"
]

instance DamperActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for air damper control in HVAC systems"
]

instance ValveController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller for fluid valves in Building Control Systems"
]

instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "AECO domain building in a Living Lab case study as a cyber-physical asset for real-time monitoring, simulation, and optimization"
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, CO2Sensor, LightSensor, OccupancySensor, HVACActuator, LightingController, DamperActuator, ValveController
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the DT and sent to actuators/controllers in the physical BCS through Eclipse Hono and Ditto."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous data exchange for operational monitoring and control."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A centralized framework where BIM serves as the semantic backbone, integrated with Eclipse Hono/Ditto for data exchange, Unreal Engine for visualization, and modular service extensions for scalability."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the entire building life cycle from initial design through construction, operation, and refurbishment phases."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to measure interoperability and architectural soundness."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange via Eclipse Hono and Ditto, leveraging IoT protocols for communication between physical assets and the DT."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Standardized interfaces and modular architecture to enable interoperability with external information systems and services."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with AECO-specific standards, particularly Building Information Modeling (BIM), and standardized integration mechanisms for interoperability."
]
